# Get App Details

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches app metadata.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to return app details using your adamId in the resource path. Related objects: [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/MediaDetail], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/MediaDetailResponse].

### Get app details example



## App Details

- **Get Localized App Details**: Fetches the localized default product page for an app.

items.description: Fetches the localized default product page for an app.
